path: Problem: Return a related field (e.g., Name) for each ID in a filtered list, but only when the source row meets an additional condition (e.g., Result = Pass)
Action: Use INDEX to return the target column and MATCH to locate the row using a multi-criteria lookup by concatenating criteria arrays

Observation: Standard VLOOKUP fails when the lookup value is not in the first column of the lookup range and/or when the match must satisfy multiple conditions; concatenating lookup keys enables an exact multi-criteria match
